title: Coilonox vittatum
taxonomy: Coilonox vittatum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus or rue family. It belongs to the genus Coilonox, which is a small group of plants native to Australia. The species vittatum is characterized by its distinctive leaves and fruit. Further classification of Coilonox vittatum includes its being a part of the order Sapindales. This classification is based on its botanical features and genetic relationships with other plants in the Rutaceae family.
